**What this changes**

**Why**

**Testing**
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace --all-targets` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check` passes
- [ ] New behavior has a test, or an existing one was updated

**Config / behavior changes**
- [ ] Any new or changed config field is reflected in the [configuration reference](https://abhinavcdev.github.io/torana/docs/configuration/) table
- [ ] Not applicable
